name: 2pc 12" LED Twinkling Starburst Christmas Novelty Sculpture Light White with Gold Wire - Wondershop™
description:
Add celestial magic to your holiday decor with these 2-Piece LED Twinkling Starburst Christmas Novelty Sculpture Lights from Wondershop™. This novelty light set features two 12-inch white starburst designs made of PVC, wrapped in gold wire and adorned with 140 LED bulbs in warm white, pure white and gold hues, creating a joyful and festive glow. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, these lights can be displayed anywhere to add a touch of holiday enchantment.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
